/home/pi/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/em++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -O2 -sUSE_SDL=2 -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=ccall,UTF8ToString -sMIN_WEBGL_VERSION=2 -sMAX_WEBGL_VERSION=2 -sFORCE_FILESYSTEM=1 --shell-file /home/pi/Workspace/DEMO1/web/shell.html CMakeFiles/demo.dir/home/pi/Workspace/DEMO1/third_party/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/demo.dir/home/pi/Workspace/DEMO1/third_party/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/demo.dir/home/pi/Workspace/DEMO1/third_party/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/demo.dir/home/pi/Workspace/DEMO1/third_party/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/demo.dir/home/pi/Workspace/DEMO1/third_party/imgui/imgui_impl_sdl2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/demo.dir/home/pi/Workspace/DEMO1/third_party/imgui/imgui_impl_sdlrenderer2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/demo.dir/home/pi/Workspace/DEMO1/SHOW/Lorenz.cpp.o CMakeFiles/demo.dir/home/pi/Workspace/DEMO1/SHOW/Mandelbrot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/demo.dir/home/pi/Workspace/DEMO1/SHOW/Julia.cpp.o CMakeFiles/demo.dir/home/pi/Workspace/DEMO1/SHOW/Newton.cpp.o CMakeFiles/demo.dir/home/pi/Workspace/DEMO1/SHOW/Ecosys.cpp.o CMakeFiles/demo.dir/home/pi/Workspace/DEMO1/SHOW/Henon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/demo.dir/home/pi/Workspace/DEMO1/SHOW/May.cpp.o CMakeFiles/demo.dir/home/pi/Workspace/DEMO1/SHOW/Trammel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/demo.dir/home/pi/Workspace/DEMO1/DEMO/main_wasm.cpp.o -o demo.html
